name: Newtech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Newtech Co.,Ltd. provides storage products and solutions. It offers servers, desktop and rack mount NAS products, and Mac compatible products. The company also provides GPU, USB/thunderbolt storage products, FC / iSCSI RAID, network switch and card products, backup and log management software products, built-in RAID board, UPS, rack cabinet. Newtech Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
